name: Magnolia Bancorp, Inc.
business: Magnolia Bancorp, Inc. operates as a savings and loan holding company, primarily offering fixed-rate one-to-four family residential mortgage loans through its wholly owned subsidiary, Mutual Savings and Loan Association. The company also originates residential construction loans, home equity loans, and share loans, and provides various deposit accounts including checking, savings, and certificates of deposit.
sellsTo: retail customers in Jefferson and St. Tammany Parishes, Louisiana

exposures.sentence: Our loan portfolio consists primarily of fixed-rate one-to-four family residential mortgage loans that we have originated.
